markdown:
#  Rename a Submittal PDF Attachment 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Submittals tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * The submittal's status must be 'Open'.
    * Renaming a PDF attachment will automatically update its name in each step of the submittal's workflow where the attachment was included.
    * Only PDF attachments uploaded to a submittal can be renamed in the project's Submittals tool. If a PDF attachment was uploaded to another Procore tool and then added to the submittal, the PDF attachment can only be renamed by users with the appropriate permissions on the other tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Submittals** tool.
  2. Click the **Items** , **Packages** , **Spec Sections** , or **Ball In Court** tab. See [Switch Between Submittals Views](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/switch-between-submittals-views).
  3. Click **View** next to the submittal with the PDF attachment you want to rename.
  4. In the 'Submittal Workflow' table, click **Open** next to the PDF attachment you want to view. 
#####  Tip
Current attachments are indicated by a 'Current' label in the 'Version' column. See [When is a submittal attachment labeled as 'Current' in the 'Submittal Workflow' table?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-when-is-a-submittal-attachment-labeled-as-current-in-the-submittal-worfklow-table)
  5. Click the ![Icon Info2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ad53fcd86063c6f9edb8349d18287f0f/fc7da735598f40237dbb7b9ee83a6d91/icon-info2.png?fm=webp&h=16) icon to open the 'Information' panel.  
  
![Submittals Pdf Submittal Info](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/2996b977a7529ae63c809489a09d7019/d6e813b671f66a6ca5ebd609ad316760/submittals-pdf-submittal-info.png?fm=webp)  

  6. Under 'Name', click on the attachment's current name.  
  
![Submittals Pdf Rename Attachment](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/81016c403f373c1783132563e7acf4c3/779f7caac3a99fc68c8e024b4ef4f796/submittals-pdf-rename-attachment.png?fm=webp)  

  7. Enter a new name for the attachment and press ENTER on your keyboard.
  8. In the 'Rename Attachment?' window, click **Rename**.  
  
![Submittals Pdf Rename Attachment Window](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/3f7526c563e3008f2a1c3ea126da9460/6facdd5a265e371d62b803180f98d566/submittals-pdf-rename-attachment-window.png?fm=webp)  
  
A banner displays to confirm the attachment was renamed.
  9. Click **Close** to close the PDF viewer and to return to the submittal.  
  
![submittals-pdf-close.png](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/16e7734d196426a598f0c9269221f979/7db268ffee426ce94f207c83d50deb50/submittals-pdf-close.png?fm=webp)


## See Also

  * [View Submittal Attachments](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/view-submittal-attachments)
title: Rename a Submittal PDF Attachment
description: How to rename a submittal PDF attachment.
